meaning: 闃块泤鍏嬩慨[娉曞浗绉戣タ鍢夊矝棣栧簻]
examples: I was training with my former club Ajaccio for two months, so my physical condition is okay.
Mourinho has cast his eye over Porato and now the former Ajaccio shot-stopper is anxiously awaiting news whether he showcased his skills well enough with the West Londoners.
Capped 26 times for Algeria, he moved to France from his homeland in 2003 with AC Ajaccio.
Now, like Catilina, who is with Ajaccio, he has left the San Siro and will sign for Kilmarnock when the paperwork is completed on Thursday.
Fifa said it had also received a request from Algeria about former Liverpool midfielder Carl Medjani, who now plays for Ajaccio in the French second division.
